page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Eva and Good Friends
text:
is a video game that was made and published by Gainax on 23 July 1998 for the PlayStation and on 05 November 1998 on Sega Saturn. It was sold for 6800 Yen (plus tax) at release. It also features characters of ' and ', besides Neon Genesis Evangelions characters.

Overview

Staff

Opening Animation:
Director: Hiroyuki Yamaga
Animation Director: Yuyuki Yanase
Original Picture: Yuyuki Yanase
CG Director of Photography: Masahiro Ito

Ending Animation:
Conte: Takeshi Mori
Original Picture: Isamu Imakake
Art: Hiroshi Sasaki
Planning/Production: Gainax
